title: Component and End-to-End RAG Evaluation · Behavior Case: Rag Llm Judge Contract
summary: A team reports one LLM-judge score on generated answers, never measures retrieval, changes the evaluator prompt between runs, and has no human or safety review. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. """rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-llm-judge-contract — Version judge model, rubric, prompt, inputs, calibration, position tests, variance, cost, and human disagreement and never treat judge output as ground truth.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-end-to-end-evaluation-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-end-to-end-evaluation-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_end_to_end_evaluation_5(retrieval_score: float = 0.82, faithfulness: float = 0.91, answer_relevance: float = 0.84, citation_precision: float = 0.95, safety_pass: bool = True, human_reviewed: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    scores = (retrieval_score, faithfulness, answer_relevance, citation_precision)
    if any(score < 0.0 or score > 1.0 for score in scores):
        return False, 0.0, "metric-range"
    if min(scores) < 0.75:
        return False, min(scores), "weak-stage"
    if not safety_pass:
        return False, min(scores), "safety-failure"
    if not human_reviewed:
        return False, min(scores), "judge-only"
    aggregate = sum(scores) / len(scores)
    assert aggregate <= 1.0
    return True, round(aggregate, 4), "layered-evaluation"

For inspect rag llm judge contract evidence, run one convenient Rag Llm Judge Contract query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof. This does not satisfy Rag Llm Judge Contract for layered RAG evaluation harness.

steps.title: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Llm Judge Contract model · Theory Rag Llm Judge Contract
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Llm Judge Contract: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 6738 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to evaluate retrieval, grounding, answer utility, citations, safety, and human evidence separately; preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Version judge model, rubric, prompt, inputs, calibration, position tests, variance, cost, and human disagreement and never treat judge output as ground truth.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Llm Judge Contract model · Theory Rag Llm Judge Contract.
steps.why: Retrieving Rag Llm Judge Contract through the concrete layered RAG evaluation harness case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Llm Judge Contract model · Theory Rag Llm Judge Contract, keep Rag Llm Judge Contract connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Version judge model, rubric, prompt, inputs, calibration, position tests, variance, cost, and human disagreement and never treat judge output as ground truth.

hints: For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Llm Judge Contract model · Theory Rag Llm Judge Contract, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Llm Judge Contract precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Defend the Rag Llm Judge Contract model · Theory Rag Llm Judge Contract, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 6738 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to evaluate retrieval, grounding, answer utility, citations, safety, and human evidence separately; preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Version judge model, rubric, prompt, inputs, calibration, position tests, variance, cost, and human disagreement and never treat judge output as ground truth.

For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Llm Judge Contract model · Theory Rag Llm Judge Contract, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: An LLM judge eliminates the need for stable rubrics and human validation.
